response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior software developer, which exceeds the entry-level requirement of the job. Their skills include TypeScript, REST API, and relational databases, aligning with the job requirements. However, their seniority and past roles at major companies like Google and Meta may indicate higher salary expectations and potentially less willingness to adapt to an entry-level position.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and REST API
Experience with various technologies and programming languages
concerns: Seniority level exceeds the job requirement
Potential mismatch between salary expectations and entry-level compensation
May lack the willingness to take on entry-level responsibilities
